steps.title: Require a harmful effect
steps.content: The student's assertion is that escaped transgenic fish may cause significant negative long-term ecological effects. A supporting quotation must therefore show a plausible harmful consequence in wild ecosystems.

steps.title: Reject evidence without harm
steps.content: Choice A only compares sex ratios at observed sites. Choice B says researchers lack sufficient impact studies, which does not support a specific negative effect. Choice C concerns whether observations cover all introduced ecosystems. The answer is D.
